baseline.description: Local direct-sampling heldout pool with hidden tests used only for evaluation.

library.verification: reference code must pass public and hidden tests under the local executor

retrieval.method: TF-IDF over task text, entry point, public tests, and verified library code

pre_registered_read.positive: semantic retrieval+adaptation recovers more direct misses than random and shuffled controls, and a deployable selector captures a meaningful fraction of oracle pool coverage with lower false-pass rate than first-visible
pre_registered_read.negative: pool coverage rises but deployable selectors cannot identify correct adaptations, showing that false visible passes remain the gate
